# ixcloud_anycloud_k8s (Resource)

This resource represents a AnyCloudK8s.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ixcloud_anycloud_k8s" "example" {
  name                = "example-k8s-cluster"
  organizational_unit = "Management"
  cost_center         = "IX_Management"
  resource_group      = "myresourcegroup"
  tags                = ["TestTag", "K8s"]
  owner               = "hans.mueller@inventx.ch"
  service_level       = "Silver"
  location            = "sg"
  cni_kind            = "cilium"
  cni_version         = "1.18.2"
  kubernetes_version  = "1.34.3"
  cluster_size        = "small"
  splunk_stage        = "DEV"
  worker_pools = [
    {
      id                 = "default-1"
      kubernetes_version = "1.34.3"
      worker_nodes       = 3
      hardware_profile   = "p4-8"
      operating_system   = "flatcar"
      labels = {
        role = "worker"
      }
      annotations = {
        monitoring = "enabled"
      }
      taints = [
        {
          key    = "dedicated"
          value  = "gpu"
          effect = "NoSchedule"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_size` (String)
- `cni_kind` (String)
- `cni_version` (String)
- `kubernetes_version` (String)
- `location` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `service_level` (String)
- `splunk_stage` (String)
- `worker_pools` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--worker_pools))

### Optional

- `cost_center` (String)
- `organizational_unit` (String)
- `owner` (String)
- `resource_group` (String)
- `tags` (Set of String)

Required:

- `hardware_profile` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `kubernetes_version` (String)
- `operating_system` (String)
- `worker_nodes` (Number)

Optional:

- `labels` (Map of String)
- `taints` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--worker_pools--taints))

### Nested Schema for `worker_pools.taints`

Required:

- `effect` (String)
- `key` (String)

Optional:
